description:
Enpass is a cross-platform password management app to securely store passwords and other credentials in a virtual vault locked with a master password. Unlike most other popular password managers, Enpass is an offline password manager.


Enpass has been redesigned with a modern interface, cleaner layouts, and streamlined workflows. This update builds on that foundation with fixes and stability improvements based on feedback from our beta testers.
Here's what's been fixed:
- Fixed an issue where the Enpass browser extension was not detected by the latest version of Microsoft Edge.
- Enpass now runs smoothly when unlocking the app, launching from the system tray, and quitting.
- Minor bug fixes and improvements.
If you run into any issues, reach out to us at support@enpass.io.
